description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of a man with a shaved head in a dark shirt, captioned 'FONDLING A CHILD, CRUELTY TOWARD A CHILD & SEXUAL ASSAULT' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Miami' label and an ICE logo.
